title: Align e2e build output assertions with CLI artifact labels

source.subject: fix(e2e): align build output assertions with CLI artifact labels

body:
E2e CLI tests assert build output using the same artifact labels the `beskid build` CLI emits, reducing brittle path checks.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`bf32227`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/bf32227)
- **Subject:** fix(e2e): align build output assertions with CLI artifact labels
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `analysis-pipeline`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
